batched-questions.description: discuss-set rewritten to use AskUserQuestion with multi-header batching and pre-filled option arrays. Each gray area presented as a single AskUserQuestion with 2-3 options plus 'I'll answer in my own words'.

dark-purple-banners.description: Planning-stage backgrounds changed from bright blue (\x1b[104m) to dark purple (\x1b[45m). Execution and review stages updated for visual consistency.

options-always-present.description: All AskUserQuestion calls across all skills provide at least 2 pre-filled options. Freeform questions include an 'I'll answer in my own words' option.

no-optionless-questions.description: Every AskUserQuestion invocation in any SKILL.md must include at least one pre-filled option. Freeform questions must include an 'I'll answer in my own words' escape hatch option.

banner-readability.description: All banner backgrounds must provide sufficient contrast with bright white (\x1b[97m) text. Dark purple (\x1b[45m) passes; bright pink does not.
